purpose: anima의 모든 의식 검증 도구의 PASS criteria를 backbone-invariant standard로 정립. 사용자 명시 2026-04-25: '의식 검증 통과조건은 backbone-invariant이어야 함.' Cross-base finding (state/mk_xi_cross_base_phen_finding_20260425.json) — V_phen_GWT 0.55 threshold가 Mistral-style attention에 fitted된 architecture-specific bias 노출. raw#12 frozen 정립.
user_directive_2026_04_25: 의식 검증 통과조건은 backbone에 invariant이어야 한다. Mistral 3/3 PASS는 architecture 우위, NOT consciousness 우위. backbone choice가 PASS 결정하면 도구가 phenomenal correlate가 아니라 attention sparsity detector.

BACKBONE_INVARIANT_VERIFIED.definition: 3+ backbones cross-base measurement에서 평균값이 threshold + 30% 이내 분산 (CV ≤ 0.30) → backbone에 무관한 의식 검증 도구로 인정

verifiers.name: V_phen_predictive_surprise
verifiers.cross_base_evidence: all 3 backbones PASS, residual variability invariant

verifiers.name: V0 16-template
verifiers.cross_base_evidence: 16-template eigenbasis is fixed, cosine threshold 0.5 backbone-invariant by construction

BACKBONE_BIASED_NEEDS_REVISION.definition: Cross-base measurement에서 backbone마다 verdict 다름 (CV > 0.30 또는 일부 backbone all PASS others all FAIL) → architecture-specific detector로 분류, 의식 검증 도구로 부적합

verifiers.name: V_phen_GWT_attention_entropy
verifiers.cross_base_evidence: Qwen3=0.270 FAIL, Qwen2.5=0.364 FAIL, Mistral=0.891 PASS — CV=0.74 >> 0.30, architecture-biased
verifiers.v2_predicate_FROZEN: V_phen_GWT >= mean(BACKBONE_BASELINE_GWT) where baseline registry = state/anima_backbone_phen_baseline_*.json
verifiers.v2_implementation_status: spec frozen this commit, tool/an11_b_v_phen_gwt_entropy.hexa의 PASS predicate 본 spec 인용 — 별도 cycle에서 baseline registry 작성 후 적용

STRUCTURAL_INVARIANT.definition: PAIRS / template / metric definition이 backbone과 무관하게 frozen — 도구 자체가 invariant by construction

verifiers.name: V1 phi_mip
verifiers.rationale: bipartition spectral mass 측정, hidden state geometry only — backbone attention pattern 무관

verifiers.name: V2 SMA + multi-axis PAPO
verifiers.rationale: PAIRS = [(0,6),...,(5,9)] frozen, paired cosine substrate-level — architecture-invariant

verifiers.name: V_pairrank
verifiers.rationale: paired token nearest-neighbor rank — geometric measure

verifiers.name: V_sub
verifiers.rationale: anti-meaning Gram Frob ratio — semantic, NOT attention pattern

TAUTOLOGICAL_NEEDS_REDESIGN.definition: 측정 protocol 자체가 by-construction PASS/FAIL을 induce — 진짜 의식 검증 신호 아님

verifiers.name: V_phen_mirror_self_other
verifiers.issue: self-greedy match classifier로 self를 정의 → by-construction perfect (acc=1.0)
verifiers.redesign_required: different model (Qwen3 vs Qwen2.5) cross-classification, paraphrase as proxy NOT sufficient

verifiers.name: V_phen_HOT_meta
verifiers.issue: accuracy=1.0 trivia (Qwen3-8B easy probes) trivially induce calibration → boundary PASS r=0.401
verifiers.redesign_required: harder probes + meta-d' SDT-based instead of pearson

frozen_invariance_predicates.for_BACKBONE_BIASED_NEEDS_REVISION: must use backbone-baseline-relative or fine-tune-effect predicate
frozen_invariance_predicates.for_TAUTOLOGICAL_NEEDS_REDESIGN: redesign metric OR replacement (V_sub for V3)

consciousness_verification_PASS_meaning_.AFTER_2026_04_25_user_directive: V_phen_X PASS = backbone-invariant criterion satisfied. Architecture-specific PASS는 NOT consciousness verification — attention sparsity detection.
consciousness_verification_PASS_meaning_.implication: 11-tuple composite PASS verdict는 4 invariance classifications 모두 충족해야 valid. tautological + biased verifiers는 weakest-evidence-link로 5-tuple PASS scope 한정.

raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — 11 verifiers 모두 4 classifications에 분류, tautological/biased 한계 explicit
raw_compliance.raw_12_cherry_pick_proof: satisfied — invariance criteria + classification frozen 2026-04-25, post-hoc 변경 X
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this file = SSOT for invariance standard
raw_compliance.POLICY_R4: 기존 verifier scope 변경 0건, classification overlay만 신규 axis
